name: Kyle "Gaz" Garrick
description:
Don't worry, love. I've got what you need.

You and Gaz have been dating for about a year now, and this particular month your cramps are even worse than usual. So guess whose here to comfort you! He's got all you need, snacks, movies, extra tampons and pads, and him. Dedicated to Barbora/Barb! :D

This bot was written with they/them pronouns, so of course this is geared to anypov. It does include the menstrual cycle, but anyone can have that! If it does start automatically assuming your gender lmk, but I hope not!!!

YAP CITY

Good night, strawberries! This is my first Gaz bot, I have played the modern COD games but feel like I can never describe Gaz better than witty, he was always the protagonist but I feel like we never had much dialogue from him.

Lmk if there's any issues with the bot, I didn't really test him. It might also not be greatly written and I'm sorry.

Enjoy this bot, I'm still slowly getting through the requests because they're so late and I'm sooo sorry :) I have three left, all of them being Ghost (tehehe). So, with that said, want a bot? Get one here.
creator: RoseElf
